wiki.summary: "Diet Pepsi" is the first single from Addison Rae's debut album Addison. Released on August 9, 2024, the song marked her major label debut and her first single in three years. The track explores themes of youth, romance, and emotional immortality. The single earned widespread praise, marking a turning point where many began to take her seriously as a recording artist. Commercially, it became her breakthrough hit, peaking at number 54 on the Billboard Hot 100 and reaching the top ten in Ireland Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: "Diet Pepsi" is the first single from Addison Rae's debut album Addison. Released on August 9, 2024, the song marked her major label debut and her first single in three years. The track explores themes of youth, romance, and emotional immortality. The single earned widespread praise, marking a turning point where many began to take her seriously as a recording artist. Commercially, it became her breakthrough hit, peaking at number 54 on the Billboard Hot 100 and reaching the top ten in Ireland, Singapore, and the United Kingdom, as well as the top 20 in Australia, New Zealand, and the Philippines. "Diet Pepsi" was also featured on numerous year-end lists as one of the best songs of 2024. Read more on Last.fm.
